MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Steven Dibner is present.
Attorney Cindy Lee appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Todd Wolfe Grussing aka Wolfe Von Stauffenberg is present.
Attorney Floyd Chapman representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Robertson, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 502, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of FEB-14-2012 is vacated.
